title: 10 best herbal tinctures for sunburn
description: Ribwort tinctures helps with sunburn because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant's active compounds, such as hyperoside and quercetin, work to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and discomfort associated with sunburn. Additionally, ribwort tincture's hydrating effects help to replenish the skin's natural moisture barrier, promoting faster healing and relief from itching and stinging sensations.
